question: The length of hypotenuse of a right angled triangle is 15. Find the length of median of its hypotenuse.

In a right-angled triangle, the length of the median on its hypotenuse is half the length of the hypotenuse. 
Since the length of the hypotenuse = 15 unit
We know that, 
‚ąī Length of Median on its hypotenuse = 1/2xx"the length of the hypotenuse"
= 1/2√ó15
= 7.5 units
Therefore, the length of the median of its hypotenuse is 7.5 units.

question: In a parallelogram ‚Ė°ABCD, If ‚ą†A = (3x + 12)¬į, ‚ą†B = (2x - 32)¬į then find the value of x and then find the measures of ‚ą†C and ‚ą†D.
answer:
Given: ‚ą†A = (3x + 12)ňö and ‚ą†B = (2x - 32)ňö
Opposite angles of a parallelogram are equal.
‚ąī ‚ą†C = ‚ą†A ...(i)
⇒ ‚ą†C = (3x + 12)ňö
‚ą†D = ‚ą†B ‚Ä¶(ii)
‚ą†D = (2x - 32)ňö
In a quadrilateral, the sum of all the angles is equal to 360ňö.
‚ąī In squareABCD,
‚ą†A + ‚ą†B + ‚ą†C + ‚ą†D = 360ňö
‚ąī 3x + 12 + 2x - 32 + 3x + 12 + 2x - 32 = 360
‚ąī 10x - 40 = 360
‚ąī 10x = 360 + 40
‚ąī 10x = 400
‚ąī x = 400/10
‚ąī x = 40
‚ąī ‚ą†A = (3x + 12)ňö
⇒ ‚ą†A = 3 √ó 40 +12
⇒ ‚ą†A = 120 + 12
⇒ ‚ą†A = 132ňö
‚ąī ‚ą†C = 132ňö ...[From (i)]
‚ąī ‚ą†B = (2x - 32)ňö
⇒ ‚ą†B = 2 √ó 40 - 32
⇒ ‚ą†B = 80 - 32
⇒ ‚ą†B = 48ňö
‚ąī ‚ą†D = 48ňö ...[From (ii)]
Hence, the measure of x is 40.
Also, measures of ‚ą†C and ‚ą†D are 132ňö and 48ňö respectively.

‚ąī x = 25

= 50 cm
